hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines multi-provider data pipelines into a unified compliance workflow with audit-ready evidence, role-based access, and governance tailored for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when data pipelines fragment
problem_description: Institutional teams managing VASPs struggle with disconnected customer, wallet, and transaction data across suppliers. This fragmentation hinders consistent workflows, weakens audit readiness, and complicates bank due diligence and internal governance efforts.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates customer, entity, wallet and transaction data from diverse providers into a unified compliance workflow that supports role-based access, audit-ready evidence and streamlined bank due diligence.
workflow_description: SFTY connects customer, wallet and transaction data through role-based access, audit logs and evidence to support secure compliance and institutional governance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond data silos. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY unifies data streams from multiple sources into a controlled compliance workflow with audit-ready evidence, operational decisions and governance for institutional digital asset businesses.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs requiring secure data integration, audit-ready evidence and governance frameworks for scalable compliance and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enterprise data pipeline integration
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how data pipelines connect customers wallets and transactions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence preserves compliance decision history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare role-based access and governance for institutional deployments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for regulated VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and other provider outputs into structured workflows for regulated VASPs and digital asset enterprises.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY integrate data pipelines?
faq_2_answer: SFTY integrates customer, entity, wallet and transaction data from multiple sources into one platform, linking provider outputs to compliance workflows, cases, decisions and reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence packages to help teams maintain an audit-ready compliance record and support regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY fit into existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers and systems, connecting outputs into connected workflows without requiring replacement of current compliance or analytics tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace compliance providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY is provider neutral and does not replace compliance providers but connects their outputs into a controlled operational layer for review, evidence and reporting.
final_title: Connect multi-source data into audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY integrates customer, entity, wallet and transaction data with role-based access and governance controls.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
